channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: College Basketball 2025-2026 Buzz: UNC's Caleb Wilson Breaks Thumb, Season Over
item.description: We're tracking notable injuries, news and happenings across men's and women's college basketball during the 2025-2026 season.

item.title: College Basketball Games of The Week: Big Ten Tourney, Tobacco Road Rematch
item.description: There are top teams in men's and women's hoops going at it this weekend, and we're here to help you prepare for the action!

item.title: 2026 NFL Offseason Rumors: Texans Release Joe Mixon; Wentz-Reich Reunion?
item.description: Here's the latest offseason buzz and rumors around the NFL.

item.title: DraftKings Promo Code: Bet $5, Get $200 on USA vs Brazil in the World Baseball Classic
item.description: DraftKings Promo Code: Bet $5, Get $200 on USA vs Brazil in the World Baseball Classic.

item.title: 'Like A Big Family:' Julio Rodríguez, Dominican Republic Enter WBC With Confidence
item.description: After finding himself in Seattle, Julio Rodríguez looks to help the Dominican Republic rebound at the World Baseball Classic.

item.title: Fired Michigan coach Moore reaches plea deal
item.description: Fired Michigan football coach Sherrone Moore pleaded no contest to two misdemeanors to resolve a felony home invasion case. The deal was struck on the...

item.title: OT Decker, longest-tenured Lion, asks for release
item.description: Offensive lineman Taylor Decker, the Lions' longest-tenured player, has requested his release, he announced on social media.

item.title: Ogunbowale arrested following Unrivaled title win
item.description: Dallas Wings guard Arike Ogunbowale was arrested and charged with misdemeanor battery in Miami early Thursday morning after she allegedly punched a ma...

item.title: UNC's Wilson (thumb surgery) done for season
item.description: North Carolina star freshman Caleb Wilson will miss the remainder of the season after breaking his right thumb during practice, the school announced.

item.title: Isles land Blues captain Schenn for playoff push
item.description: The Islanders have acquired Brayden Schenn in trade that sends Jonathan Drouin, two picks and a prospect back to the Blues. Schenn, 34, had served as ...
